navigation.archive_path: seed → navigation link for a specific volume/issue → /blog/category/volume-X-issue-Y/ lists article entries
navigation.notes: Listing pages show 10 posts per page and have no direct PDF links; PDFs are linked only in individual article pages via an <a href="...pdf"> link. Pagination is not present on volume pages; all posts of the issue appear on a single page. The forum category functions like a separate issue section. There is a full archive page at /by-volume/ that lists all volumes.
